name: Uxinzelelo oluthe ngqo lokuLawula ukopha
description: Uluhlu lokuqala lolawulo lokuphuma kwegazi kwindawo efikelelekayo kunye namanxeba omzimba.
steps: Gcoba isinxibo sokwenzakala okanye ilaphu elisongiweyo ngqo phezu kwenxeba.
Cinezela ngokuqinileyo ngesithende sesandla sakho. Sebenzisa ubunzima bomzimba wakho -- hayi nje amandla engalo.
Bamba uxinzelelo oluqhubekayo, olungaphazamisekiyo ubuncinane imizuzu emi-3.
Sukuphakamisa isinxibo ukuze ujonge -- oku kuphazamisa ukumila kwehlwili.
Ukuba ukopha kuyavuza, yongeza enye into yokunxiba ngaphezulu. Musa ukususa eyokuqala.
Khusela nge-bandage yoxinzelelo ukuba ikhona kwaye uhambe kwindawo yokupakisha amanxeba okanye i-tourniquet ukuba ukuphuma kwegazi kuqhubeka.
warnings: Uxinzelelo oluthe ngqo lulodwa alwanelanga ukopha kwemithambo-- ukunyukela ekupakishweni kwenxeba okanye kwi-tourniquet.
Amanxeba adibeneyo (i-groin, i-axilla, intamo) ifuna ukupakishwa kwamanxeba, kungekhona uxinzelelo lwangaphandle lodwa.

pediatric.note: Uxinzelelo olulinganayo kuphela. Kuphephe ukucinezela i-thorax kwiintsana.

obstetric.note: Kuphephe ucinezelo olunzima phezu kwesibeleko segravid. Sebenzisa ukupakisha okusecaleni ukuba inxeba lokuhlangana kufutshane ne-pelvis.
